title: SSA FY2025 Budget — DDS Section (Extracted)
description: The DDS-specific section extracted from SSA's FY2025 Congressional Justification: budget-authority and work-year tables (FY2023 enacted / FY2024 estimate / FY2025 President's Budget), including DDS work-years (13,554 / 13,364 / 13,555) and the note that SSA funds the full cost (including pay) of state DDS employees while each state sets its own pay rates. A focused companion to the full CJ extract.
notes: Computed: DDS-specific budget section extracted from the FY25 CJ PDF (subset of cj-fy25-extracted.md). Contains budget-authority/work-year tables and narrative, not a tidy machine table, so no per-column schema. Reinforces the national-only DDS-funding finding. Source URL is the parent CJ PDF (the same FY25-JEAC.pdf).
